title: Doctor check: rules_dir_unindexed (orphan .md files)
description: F19 fallback: detect .md files in .fabric/rules/ that aren't in agents.meta.json nodes. R28's MCP sync proactively handles this; doctor is the periodic full-physical safety net.
scope: Layer 2 P1 — doctor extension covering R28 edge cases

files.change: NEW fixable check `rules_dir_unindexed`: scan .fabric/rules/*.md, compare with meta.nodes; report orphans with action_hint
Test: drop foo.md into rules/ without sync; doctor reports rules_dir_unindexed with foo.md path; --fix indexes it
